task_completion.description: The ground station 'MSI_Chicago' is created and assigned to the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'MSI_Chicago' displayed in the GPredict interface, typically in the module's header, the map's center marker, or the status bar indicating the active QTH.

task_completion.description: The 'Crewed_Missions' module is created and tracks the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab named 'Crewed_Missions' is visible. On the map, icons and labels for both the International Space Station (ISS ZARYA) and the Chinese Space Station (CSS TIANHE) are clearly displayed.

task_completion.description: The module uses a Map-only layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict window displays only a world map for the module. There should be no satellite list panels, polar plot views, or single-satellite view panels visible within the module area.

task_completion.description: Ground tracks are displayed for all satellites for 2 orbits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Continuous lines indicating the future/past trajectory (ground tracks) of both the ISS and CSS are drawn on the map. The lines should be long enough to wrap around the map approximately twice, representing 2 full orbits.

task_completion.description: The 'Crewed_Missions' module is the only one open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is only one module tab visible ('Crewed_Missions') at the top of the workspace. The default 'Amateur' tab or any other tabs must be closed.

task_completion.description: The GPredict application is set to full-screen mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window occupies the entire screen. The OS window title bar, window controls (minimize/maximize/close), and the desktop environment's taskbar/dock should be hidden.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict dialog boxes (e.g., Edit Ground Station, Configure Module, Preferences) being interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GPredict interface (maps, menus, satellite icons) is visible, not a text editor, mock-up, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI using terminal commands to directly write configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing commands like 'echo', 'cat', or 'nano' modifying '.qth' or '.mod' files directly in the ~/.config/Gpredict/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Station Name: MSI_Chicago. Coordinates: 41.7906 N, 87.5830 W (or -87.583), Altitude: 181m. Module Name: Crewed_Missions. Required Satellites: ISS ZARYA (NORAD 25544) and CSS TIANHE (NORAD 48274). Expected Orbits for ground tracks: 2.
